ja_name: 古川古松軒筆　松前蝦夷地之図
name_romaji: Furukawa Koshōken hitsu Matsumae Ezochi no zu
name_en: Map of Matsumae and Ezo Lands, Brushed by Furukawa Koshōken
description_en: This is an old document (archival material), a map of the Matsumae and Ezo lands brushed by Furukawa Koshōken. It is municipally designated by Hakodate City. It was designated on 1962-11-03.

ja_description_WITHHELD: 松前神楽に使用される獅子頭。文化4年（1807年）福島大神宮本殿の火事で神楽道具が消失したため各村有志の氏子らによって寄進された。松前の彫物師清兵衛が制作。
name_en: Lion Head for Kagura
description_en: A lion head (shishigashira) used for kagura performance, classified as a tangible folk cultural property. It is town-designated by Fukushima Town (designated 3 November 1995).

ja_name: ペリー提督寄贈の洋酒びん2本（小島家旧蔵・旧花光コレクション）
name_romaji: Perī teitoku kizō no yōshu bin 2-hon (Kojima-ke kyūzō Kyū Hanamitsu korekushon)
name_en: Two Western Liquor Bottles Presented by Commodore Perry (Former Kojima Family Holding, Former Hanamitsu Collection)
description_en: This is a historical material, two Western liquor bottles presented by Commodore Perry, formerly held by the Kojima family and part of the former Hanamitsu Collection. It is municipally designated by Hakodate City. It was designated on 1979-10-23.

name_en: Ezo Brocade (Ezo Nishiki)
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the form of Ezo brocade textile. It is town-designated and located in Akkeshi Town.

name_en: Taxidermied Walrus
description_en: This is an animal specimen (fauna), a taxidermied walrus. It is municipally designated by Hakodate City. It was designated on 1962-11-03.

ja_name: 蝦夷隯奇観　松浦武四郎写
name_en: Remarkable Views of the Island of Ezo, Copied by Matsuura Takeshirō
description_en: This is an old document (archival material), a copy of 'Ezo-tō kikan' (Remarkable Views of the Island of Ezo) transcribed by Matsuura Takeshirō. It is municipally designated by Hakodate City. It was designated on 1966-11-03.

ja_name: 十勝鉄道蒸気機関車4号及び客車コハ23号
name_romaji: Tokachi Tetsudō Jōki Kikansha 4-gō oyobi Kyakusha Koha 23-gō
name_en: Tokachi Railway Steam Locomotive No. 4 and Passenger Car Koha No. 23
description_en: A tangible cultural property. It is municipally designated and located in Obihiro City.

ja_name: 伝目定作　釈迦如来坐像
ja_description_WITHHELD: （昭和54年12月7日指定・複数の同名坐像あり）
name_romaji: Den Mokujō saku Shaka Nyorai zazō
name_en: Seated Statue of Shaka Nyorai (Śākyamuni), Attributed to Mokujō
description_en: This is a sculpture, a seated statue of Shaka Nyorai (Śākyamuni) attributed to Mokujō. It is municipally designated by Hakodate City. It was designated on 1979-12-07.

name_en: Bound Collection of the Hakodate Newspaper
description_en: This is a classical book (tenseki), a bound collection of the Hakodate Shinbun (newspaper). It is municipally designated by Hakodate City. It was designated on 1964-11-03.

ja_category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
ja_location: 北海道伊達市末永町228番地2
name_en: Japanese Cypress (Hinoki)
description_en: A natural monument in the category of monuments, municipally designated on 27 December 1973. It is located at 228-2 Suenaga-chō, Date City, Hokkaido.

ja_name: 八木Ｂ遺跡出土『注口土器及び下部有孔土器』
name_romaji: Yagi B iseki shutsudo 'Chūkō doki oyobi kabu yūkō doki'
name_en: Spouted Vessel and Perforated Lower-Section Vessel Excavated from the Yagi B Site
description_en: This is an archaeological material (earthenware) consisting of a spouted vessel and a vessel with perforations in its lower section, excavated from the Yagi B Site. It is municipally designated by Hakodate City. It was designated on 2000-08-10.

ja_location: 北海道伊達市梅本町61番地2
name_en: Storehouse of the Former Date Family
description_en: A tangible cultural property, municipally designated on 28 September 1992. It is located at 61-2 Umemoto-chō, Date City, Hokkaido.

ja_description_WITHHELD: 富山県黒部市からの移住者を指導者として珸瑶瑁1区の青年が習い始めた。大正2年に歯舞光明寺の入仏式で舞ったのがきっかけとされる。
name_en: Goyōmai Lion Kagura Dance
description_en: An intangible folk cultural property in the form of a lion (shishi) kagura performance. It is a municipally designated property located in Nemuro City, designated on 9 January 1969.

ja_name: カムチャッカ出土　マンモス牙
name_en: Mammoth Tusk Excavated in Kamchatka
description_en: This is a geological/mineral material (geology and minerals), a mammoth tusk excavated in Kamchatka. It is municipally designated by Hakodate City. It was designated on 1962-11-03.

ja_name: アヨロ遺跡出土の装身具等
name_en: Ornaments and Related Items Excavated from the Ayoro Site
description_en: A tangible cultural property consisting of personal ornaments and related items excavated from the Ayoro site. It is a town-designated property located in Shiraoi Town, designated on 4 April 1986.

ja_description_WITHHELD: 所有者:柳心介冑流保存会
name_en: Ryūshin Kaichū-ryū (Intangible Folk Cultural Property)
description_en: An intangible folk cultural property. It is municipally designated in Date City, Hokkaidō, with the designation dated 10 March 1984.

ja_subcategory: 有形文化財(美術工芸品)
name_en: Artifacts Excavated from the Akatsuki Site
description_en: A tangible cultural property (fine arts and crafts), namely excavated artifacts. It is municipally designated and located in Obihiro City.

name_en: Statue of Jizō Bosatsu by Mokujiki
description_en: A statue of Jizō Bosatsu attributed to Mokujiki (Mokujiki-butsu), classified as a tangible cultural property. It is town-designated by Esashi Town (designated 27 October 1987).

ja_name: 絹本着色　五節句図　蠣崎波響筆（旧花光コレクション）
name_romaji: Kenpon Chakushoku Gosekku Zu Kakizaki Hakyō Hitsu (Kyū Hanamitsu Korekushon)
name_en: Color on Silk: The Five Seasonal Festivals, brushed by Kakizaki Hakyō (former Hanamitsu Collection)
description_en: This is a tangible cultural property (painting), color on silk depicting the five seasonal festivals (gosekku), brushed by Kakizaki Hakyō and from the former Hanamitsu Collection. It is municipally designated in Hakodate City, designated on 3 November 1965.

name_en: Grave of Master Oyama Tetsuzō
description_en: The grave of Oyama Tetsuzō, classified as a tangible cultural property. It is town-designated by Esashi Town (designated 26 November 1991).

ja_category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
name_en: Tsukushikoi Chashi Site
description_en: A historic site comprising the remains of a chashi (Ainu fortified site). It is a town-designated cultural property located in Akkeshi Town.

name_en: Picture of Yachiyo Bridge at Benten Island
description_en: This is a tangible cultural property (painting) depicting the Yachiyo Bridge at Benten Island. It is municipally designated in Hakodate City, designated on 28 February 1978.

ja_category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
name_en: The Great Cedar Tree "Ōfune no Sugi"
description_en: This is a natural monument (tennen kinenbutsu), a great cedar tree known as "Ōfune no Sugi." It is municipally designated and located in Hakodate City, designated on 1978-02-28.

ja_name: 鹿島稲荷神社祭神御堂
name_en: Deity Hall of Kashima Inari Shrine
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the form of the hall enshrining the deity of Kashima Inari Shrine. It is town-designated and located in Akkeshi Town.

ja_name: 樺太出土　マンモス下顎骨と臼歯
name_romaji: Karafuto shutsudo manmosu kagakukotsu to kyūshi
name_en: Mammoth Lower Jawbone and Molars Excavated in Sakhalin
description_en: This is a geological/mineral material (geology and minerals), a mammoth lower jawbone and molars excavated in Karafuto (Sakhalin). It is municipally designated by Hakodate City. It was designated on 1962-11-03.

name_en: Ship Votive Plaques (Two Pieces)
description_en: Two votive plaques depicting ships (funa-ema), classified as a tangible folk cultural property. They are town-designated by Esashi Town (designated 14 July 1981).

name_en: Chinese Beauty (Karabijin)
description_en: This is a tangible cultural property (painting) depicting a Chinese beauty (karabijin). It is municipally designated in Hakodate City, designated on 3 November 1963.

ja_name: 錦岡樽前山神社 円空作樽前権現像および奉納品7点
ja_description_WITHHELD: 円空作樽前権現像および奉納品7点
name_romaji: Nishikioka Tarumaesan Jinja Enkū-saku Tarumae Gongen-zō oyobi hōnōhin nanaten
name_en: Enkū's Statue of Tarumae Gongen at Nishikioka Tarumaesan Shrine, with Seven Votive Offerings
description_en: This is a tangible cultural property, a statue of Tarumae Gongen carved by Enkū, together with seven votive offerings, held at Nishikioka Tarumaesan Shrine. It is municipally designated and located in Tomakomai City at Nishikioka Tarumaesan Shrine.

ja_location: 根室市花咲港209 根室市歴史と自然の資料館
ja_description_WITHHELD: 旧松前藩福山城の守護神として祀られていたと伝わる。座り像で高さ2メートル余りの組立式。
name_en: Statue of Ebisu
description_en: A tangible cultural property in the form of a statue of Ebisu. It is a municipally designated property held at the Nemuro City Museum of History and Nature, 209 Hanasaki-kō, Nemuro City, designated on 25 June 1976.

ja_category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
ja_location: 北海道伊達市北黄金町75番地の内
name_en: Kitakogane No. 3 Archaeological Site
description_en: A historic site (archaeological site) in the category of monuments, municipally designated on 25 April 1997. It is located within 75 Kitakogane-chō, Date City, Hokkaido.
